trials.title: Discontinuation of CDK4/6 Inhibitors in Patients With Metastatic HR Positive, HER2 Negative Breast Cancer
trials.explanation: Patient meets all eligibility criteria for this trial, indicating a good fit for the study requirements.

criteria.rationale: Patient's HR status (positive) matches the trial's requirement for HR positive disease.
Patient's HER2 status (negative) meets the trial's requirement for HER2 negativity.

criteria.text: On a CDK4/6 inhibitor (with endocrine therapy)
criteria.rationale: Patient is currently on a CDK4/6 inhibitor, fulfilling the trial's treatment requirement.

criteria.text: Durable disease control on CDK4/6i for >=12 months
criteria.rationale: Patient has had durable disease control on CDK4/6 inhibitors for at least 12 months, as required by the trial.
Patient's ECOG status (1) is within the acceptable range for this trial.

locations.facility: MVZ für Hämatologie und Onkologie der MVZ Mülheim GmbH

trials.title: PAveMenT: Palbociclib and Avelumab in Metastatic AR+ Triple Negative Breast Cancer
trials.explanation: Patient does not meet the eligibility criteria for this trial due to hormone receptor status requirements.

criteria.rationale: Patient's ER status (positive) does not meet the trial's requirement for ER negativity.
Patient's PR status (positive) does not meet the trial's requirement for PR negativity.
Patient's HER2 status (negative) meets the trial's requirement for HER2 negativity.
Patient's AR status (positive) matches the trial's requirement for AR positivity.
Patient has measurable disease, fulfilling the trial's requirement.

trials.title: A Study of Disitamab Vedotin With Other Anticancer Drugs in Solid Tumors
trials.explanation: Patient does not meet the eligibility criteria for this trial due to HER2 status requirements.

criteria.rationale: Patient's HER2 status (zero) does not meet the trial's requirement for HER2 positivity or low expression.
Patient has metastatic disease, which is required for this trial.
Patient's ECOG status (1) is within the acceptable range for this trial.

transcript.text: @srijanmeh8/trialsync-intake New TrialSync matching task. Match patient P001 against all curated trials. Summarize the patient, then hand off down the pipeline; the analyzer posts and publishes the final result.

Patient P001 intake: Subtype: HR+/HER2-
HR/ER/PR: Positive
HER2: Negative
AR: Positive
ECOG: 1
Labs: ANC 3.2, HGB 12.8, Platelets 240.0
Prior Therapies: Letrozole (Line 1), Palbociclib (Line 1)
CDK4/6 Status: On inhibitor, durable disease control
Brain Mets: None
@srijanmeh8/trialsync-discoverer please find candidate trials.

Patient P001 candidates:
NCT06207734 - Discontinuation of CDK4/6 Inhibitors in Patients With Metastatic HR Positive, HER2 Negative Breast Cancer
NCT04360941 - PAveMenT: Palbociclib and Avelumab in Metastatic AR+ Triple Negative Breast Cancer
NCT06157892 - A Study of Disitamab Vedotin With Other Anticancer Drugs in Solid Tumors
@srijanmeh8/trialsync-parser please restate the eligibility constraints.

Patient P001 eligibility constraints:

- NCT06207734: HR must be positive, HER2 must be negative, ECOG must be 0 or 1, and patient must have been treated with CDK4/6 inhibitor plus endocrine therapy for at least 12 months with disease control.
- NCT04360941: ER must be negative, PR must be negative, HER2 must be negative, AR must be positive, and measurable disease must be present.
- NCT06157892: HER2 must be positive or low, and ECOG must be 0 or 1.

@srijanmeh8/trialsync-analyzer please compute and explain the verdicts.
